name: Sand Yanmamon

signature_move.name: Desert Wind
signature_move.description: Generates a small sandstorm by flapping its wings intensely.

description: A species of Yanmamon that lives in the desert. Unlike Yanmamon, it has a carefree personality, but is merciless against Digimon that enter its territory. Its Special Move is generating a small sandstorm by flapping its wings intensely ( Desert Wind ).
